history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle shot from behind of a muscular man's back and shoulders, seen from the neck down. He has short, dark hair and is wearing a thin, silver chain around his neck. The lighting is dramatic and moody, with strong shadows defining the musculature of his back, particularly the deltoids and trapezius muscles. The background is almost entirely black, creating a stark contrast that emphasizes the illuminated parts of his body. The overall color palette is dark and desaturated, with hints of skin tones highlighted by the dramatic lighting. The mood is intense, powerful, and somewhat mysterious. The style is photographic with a focus on form and texture.
